name: FctsIdsWorkCompnstnCaseExtr

text.value: WITH CTE_BASE AS (SELECT DISTINCT CMC_SBSB_SUBSC.SBSB_CK,CMC_SBSB_SUBSC.GRGR_CK,CMC_SBSB_SUBSC.SBSB_ID,CMC_SBSB_SUBSC.SBSB_LAST_NAME,CMC_SBSB_SUBSC.SBSB_FIRST_NAME,CMC_SBSB_SUBSC.SBSB_MID_INIT,CMC_SBSB_SUBSC.SBSB_ORIG_EFF_DT,CMC_SBSB_SUBSC.SBSB_HIRE_DT,CASE WHEN CMC_SBSB_SUBSC.SYS_LAST_UPD_DTM IS NULL THEN GETDATE() ELSE CMC_SBSB_SUBSC.SYS_LAST_UPD_DTM END AS SYS_LAST_UPD_DTM,CMC_GRGR_GROUP.GRGR_ID,CMC_MEME_MEMBER.MEME_CK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_FacetsOwner}.CMC_SBSB_SUBSC CMC_SBSB_SUBSC INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_FacetsOwner}.CMC_GRGR_GROUP CMC_GRGR_GROUP ON CMC_SBSB_SUBSC.GRGR_CK=CMC_GRGR_GROUP.GRGR_CK INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_FacetsOwner}.CMC_MEME_MEMBER CMC_MEME_MEMBER ON CMC_SBSB_SUBSC.SBSB_CK=CMC_MEME_MEMBER.SBSB_CK WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_BCBSOwner}.P_SEL_PRCS_CRITR P_SEL_PRCS_CRITR,@{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_FacetsOwner}.CMC_GRGR_GROUP CMC_GRGR WHERE P_SEL_PRCS_CRITR.SEL_PRCS_ID='WRHSINBEXCL' AND P_SEL_PRCS_CRITR.SEL_PRCS_ITEM_ID='WORKCOMP' AND P_SEL_PRCS_CRITR.SEL_PRCS_CRITR_CD='MEDPROC' AND CMC_GRGR.GRGR_ID>=P_SEL_PRCS_CRITR.CRITR_VAL_FROM_TX AND CMC_GRGR.GRGR_ID<=P_SEL_PRCS_CRITR.CRITR_VAL_THRU_TX AND CMC_GRGR.GRGR_CK=CMC_GRGR_GROUP.GRGR_CK)), CTE_WORK1 AS (SELECT SBSB_CK AS SUB_UNIQ_KEY,'FACETS' AS SRC_SYS_CD,@{pipeline().parameters.RunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.RunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,GRGR_ID AS GRP_ID,SBSB_ID AS SUB_ID,1 AS SRC_SYS_LAST_UPDT_USER_SK,CAST(SBSB_HIRE_DT AS DATE) AS HIRE_DT,CAST(SBSB_ORIG_EFF_DT AS DATE) AS ORIG_EFF_DT,CAST(SYS_LAST_UPD_DTM AS DATE) AS SRC_SYS_LAST_UPDT_DT,MEME_CK AS MBR_UNIQ_KEY,'00' AS MBR_SFX_NO,SBSB_MID_INIT AS MIDINIT,SBSB_FIRST_NAME AS FIRST_NM,SBSB_LAST_NAME AS LAST_NM FROM CTE_BASE), CTE_WORK2 AS (SELECT SBSB_CK AS SUB_UNIQ_KEY,'FACETS' AS SRC_SYS_CD FROM CTE_BASE) DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.a1_TMP_FctsIdsWorkCompnstnCaseExtr; SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.a1_TMP_FctsIdsWorkCompnstnCaseExtr FROM CTE_WORK1; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.a2_TMP_FctsIdsWorkCompnstnCaseExtr; SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.a2_TMP_FctsIdsWorkCompnstnCaseExtr FROM CTE_WORK2

JOB NAME: FctsIdsWorkCompnstnCaseExtr
CALLED BY: FctsIdsWorkCompGrpCaseSeq

PROCESSING:     Workers Compensation claims extract from FacetsDbo and load to IDS WORK_COMPNSTN_CASE table


MODIFICATIONS:

Developer                    Date                 \(9)Project                                                          Change Description                                                   Development Project\(9)          Code Reviewer          Date Reviewed       
------------------                --------------------     \(9)------------------------                                        -----------------------------------------------------------------------                  ------------------------------\(9)         -------------------------------   ----------------------------       
Akhila Manickavelu\(9)  2016-12-01\(9)5628 WORK_COMPNSTN_CASE \(9)    Original Programming\(9)\(9)\(9)          Integratedev2                           Kalyan Neelam          2017-01-09
                                                                (Facets to IDS) ETL Report 
Prabhu ES                 2022-03-02            S2S Remediation                                        MSSQL ODBC conn added and other param changes  IntegrateDev5\(9)Ken Bradmon\(9)2022-06-03

Annotations:
This job Extracts the Claims data from Facets tables to generate the load file WorkCompnstnCase.dat to be send to IDS WORK_COMPNSTN_CASE table
Join CMC_SBSB_SUBSC, CMC_MEME_MEMBER and CMC_GRGR_GROUP  for master extract and Look up on P_SEL_PRCS_CRITR for GRGR_ID
B_WORK_COMPNSTN_EMPL.dat load file have the key fields from WORK_COMPNSTN_CASE for Balancing Report
